narrative_summary: - User asked to create a new dbt component named `acme_dbt` pointing to the `https://github.com/dagster-io/jaffle_shop` repo
- Invoked the `dagster-expert` skill to handle the task

- Skill loaded its reference index and identified the relevant references: `integrations/INDEX.md`, `cli/scaffold/defs.md`, and `integrations/dagster-dbt/INDEX.md` → `integrations/dagster-dbt/scaffolding.md`
- Read the dbt scaffolding reference, which described the remote git repository workflow using `--git-url`
- Ran `uv add dagster-dbt` to install the integration library
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold defs dagster_dbt.DbtProjectComponent acme_dbt --git-url https://github.com/dagster-io/jaffle_shop` to scaffold the component
- Read the generated `defs.yaml` to confirm it contained the correct `repo_url` attribute
- Identified that jaffle_shop uses DuckDB as its adapter and ran `uv add dbt-duckdb` to install it
- Ran `uv run dg list defs` to verify — confirmed 8 dbt assets and 20 asset checks loaded successfully
